response:
source
The function begins by initializing two accumulator variables to track the sum of squares and the product of cubes separately.
***
It iterates through each integer in the provided slice to perform the necessary mathematical transformations on every single value.
***
For every number encountered, the code squares the value and adds it to the running total for the first element of the result pair.
***
Simultaneously the algorithm cubes the current number and multiplies it into the running product for the second element of the result pair.
***
If the input slice contains no elements the loop is skipped entirely leaving the sum at zero and the product at one as required by the specification.
***
Finally the function returns the computed pair of values as a fixed size array with the sum of squares first and the product of cubes second.
